title: IPTG_induction
steps: From a relatively fresh plate, grab a colony and grow Overnight at 37 °C and 225 rpm, °C, in 10 mL of LB+CAM.
Inoculate 3 mL in 30 mL of LB+CAM and incubate at 37 °C and 225 rpm, °C,
When the cells reach to a OD600 between 0.4 and 0.8, the protein expression must be induced (IPTG concentrations can vary from 0.1 to 1M).
Incubate a 37 °C at 225 rpm, °C, for 05:00:00 (Hours can vary).
creator: Denisse Chacón Ramírez
